description: Insert a double-free in target-b source (dynarray.c, bstree.c, or strmap.c) by repeating a free() on a data structure node pointer within a remove or destroy operation, creating a temporal heap corruption.

metadata.notes: Targets free() call sites in dynarray.c, bstree.c, and strmap.c — injects a duplicate free() after the original to produce a double-free condition.
